headline: Wall Street Breakfast Podcast: Markets Eye Iran Pause
summary: Trump calls off planned Iran attack, citing Middle East leaders' request. Jury rules against Musk in legal showdown with OpenAI. Royal Caribbean falls amid scrutiny on its Mexico water park.
